message:
test: add tests for ShareManagement and OnboardingTooltip

2 new test files covering 24 tests:
- ShareManagement: loading/empty states, link display with view count and
  password indicator, copy/revoke actions, expired links section, badge counts
- OnboardingTooltip: delayed visibility, message/description/shortcut rendering,
  dismiss via button and X, custom delay, tooltip role, children wrapping

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
